name: Benefitfocus Benefits Administration API
what_it_does: Benefitfocus REST API for enterprise employee benefits administration platform (acquired by Voya Financial). Enables AI agents to manage employee benefits enrollment and life events, handle open enrollment campaign workflows, access benefits eligibility and plan data, retrieve carrier EDI file management, manage COBRA and continuation coverage, access ACA compliance reporting and 1095 forms, handle FSA/HSA/HRA account management, retrieve total compensation and benefits analytics, and integrate benefits data with HRIS and payroll systems.
use_cases: Managing employee benefits enrollment and life events from HR automation agents
Handling open enrollment campaigns and decision support from benefits administration agents
Retrieving ACA compliance and 1095 reporting data from compliance automation agents
Integrating benefits data with HRIS and payroll from enterprise HR agents
not_for: Small businesses without complex multi-carrier benefits administration needs
Non-US benefits administration without US insurance and ACA compliance focus
Simple single-carrier benefits without multi-plan enrollment complexity
best_when: A mid-to-large US employer or benefits broker using Benefitfocus wants AI agents to automate benefits enrollment, carrier EDI management, ACA compliance reporting, and open enrollment campaigns.
avoid_when: PRIVACY+HIPAA: Employee benefits data includes PHI (medical plan enrollment), financial account data (FSA/HSA), and highly sensitive insurance information. ACA compliance reporting automation must be accurate — errors create IRS penalties. COBRA administration errors have legal consequences.

auth.notes: Benefitfocus uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Employer and carrier-level credentials with enrollment, eligibility, and reporting scopes. Developer portal with API documentation. EDI file management for carrier integrations. Webhooks for enrollment events.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise benefits administration pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-employee per-year enterprise pricing; annual contracts
pricing.notes: Charleston, South Carolina. Founded 2000. Major US benefits administration platform. Acquired by Voya Financial (VOYA) 2022 for $570M. Used by 1,000+ employers managing 25M+ employees. Strong carrier EDI integrations. Competes with Businessolver and WEX for benefits administration.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; enterprise SLA

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY+HIPAA: Benefits enrollment data includes PHI and financial account information — BAA required
ACA 1095 reporting errors create IRS penalties — automated filing must be accurate
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API with enterprise developer portal
COBRA administration automation must comply with strict ERISA timelines
Carrier EDI is the production channel — API typically handles employer-facing data only
Voya Financial acquisition may shift API strategy — verify current roadmap
agent_readiness.security_notes: Employee benefits and PHI data. HIPAA, SOC2, ACA. OAuth2. US data residency. Insurance and financial account sensitivity.

security_score_components.security_notes: Benefits enrollment and PHI. HIPAA, SOC2. OAuth2. US data residency. FSA/HSA financial data.
